ext_description.message: Shows your Claude.ai quota usage directly in the browser toolbar.

no_data_hint.message: No data yet. Open claude.ai to capture your quota.

onboarding_subtitle.message: Track your Claude.ai usage directly in the browser toolbar, so you never get caught off guard mid-conversation.

onboarding_step1_desc.message: Visit claude.ai and log in to your account. The extension captures your quota data automatically on page load — no setup required.

onboarding_step2_desc.message: A badge will appear on the extension icon showing your current session usage (e.g. 22%). Color changes to orange at 70% and red at 90%.

onboarding_step3_desc.message: Click the icon to see your session and weekly usage, remaining time until reset, and a manual refresh button. Data updates automatically every 10 minutes.

onboarding_donate.message: Enjoying it? Support with a donation

onboarding_footer.message: Free & open. No account, no tracking.

onboarding_step4_title.message: Pin the extension to your toolbar
